parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, slug, or email

parameters.name: createdAfter
parameters.description: Filter tenants created after this date

parameters.name: createdBefore
parameters.description: Filter tenants created before this date

404.description: tenants.not_found

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Deletion reason when body cannot be sent

get.description:
Retrieve aggregated metrics across all tenants for the platform dashboard.

**Required Permission:** `platform:analytics:view-metrics`
**Allowed Roles:** SUPER_ADMIN, ANALYTICS_ADMIN

Includes: total tenants, active users, storage usage, API request volumes

Retrieve health metrics for a specific tenant including performance indicators and potential issues.

**Required Permission:** `platform:analytics:view-tenant-health`
**Allowed Roles:** SUPER_ADMIN, SUPPORT_ADMIN, ANALYTICS_ADMIN

Health factors: API response times, error rates, resource utilization

Retrieve revenue analytics across all tenants including MRR, ARR, and billing trends.

**Required Permission:** `platform:analytics:view-revenue`
**Allowed Roles:** SUPER_ADMIN, BILLING_ADMIN

Includes: monthly recurring revenue, churn rate, growth metrics

Retrieve historical usage trends across the platform.

**Required Permission:** `platform:analytics:view-metrics`
**Allowed Roles:** SUPER_ADMIN, ANALYTICS_ADMIN

Search and filter platform-level audit logs for compliance and investigation purposes.

**Required Permission:** `platform:audit:read`
**Allowed Roles:** SUPER_ADMIN, COMPLIANCE_ADMIN, SECURITY_ADMIN

Logs include: tenant operations, impersonation sessions, security events, configuration changes

parameters.name: platformUserId
parameters.description: Filter by platform user who performed the action

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Filter by action type (e.g., TENANT_CREATED, IMPERSONATION_STARTED)

post.description:
Impersonate a tenant user for support purposes. All actions are logged.

**Required Permission:** `platform:support:impersonate`
**Allowed Roles:** SUPER_ADMIN, SUPPORT_ADMIN

**⚠️ Security Notes:**
- Session expires after 4 hours
- All actions during impersonation are logged
- A reason is required for audit trail
- Consider providing an approval ticket ID for compliance

delete.description:
End an active impersonation session.

**Required Permission:** `platform:support:impersonate`
**Note:** You can only end your own impersonation sessions

404.description: Session not found

get.description:
Get all active impersonation sessions for the current platform user.

**Required Permission:** `platform:support:impersonate`

Get the impersonation history for the current platform user.

**Required Permission:** `platform:support:impersonate`

post.description:
Force the primary tenant admin to reset their password on next login.

**Required Permission:** `platform:security:force-password-reset`
**Allowed Roles:** SUPER_ADMIN, SECURITY_ADMIN

Resolves the oldest active ADMIN user for the tenant and triggers the same flow as user-specific force reset.

**⚠️ Security Operation:** Requires reason for audit trail

200.description: Password reset initiated for tenant admin

404.description: Tenant or admin user not found

post.summary: Force password reset for tenant admin

post.description:
Force a specific user within a tenant to reset their password on next login.

**Required Permission:** `platform:security:force-password-reset`
**Allowed Roles:** SUPER_ADMIN, SECURITY_ADMIN

**⚠️ Security Operation:** Requires reason for audit trail

404.description: User or tenant not found

post.summary: Force password reset for a user

post.description:
Immediately invalidate all active sessions for users within a tenant. Users will be forced to re-authenticate.

**Required Permission:** `platform:security:revoke-sessions`
**Allowed Roles:** SUPER_ADMIN, SECURITY_ADMIN

**⚠️ Impact:** All users in the tenant will be logged out immediately
post.summary: Revoke all sessions for a tenant

post.description:
Configure allowed IP addresses/ranges for a tenant. Only requests from these IPs will be permitted.

**Required Permission:** `platform:security:update-ip-allowlist`
**Allowed Roles:** SUPER_ADMIN, SECURITY_ADMIN

**⚠️ Caution:** Incorrect configuration may lock out users
post.summary: Update IP allowlist for a tenant

post.description:
Start an asynchronous data export job for GDPR compliance. Returns a job ID to track progress.

**Required Permission:** `platform:data:export`
**Allowed Roles:** SUPER_ADMIN, COMPLIANCE_ADMIN

**Note:** Large exports may take several hours to complete

Schedule tenant data for permanent deletion (GDPR Right to Erasure). Deletion is scheduled for 30 days to allow for cancellation.

**Required Permission:** `platform:data:delete`
**Allowed Roles:** SUPER_ADMIN

**⚠️ DESTRUCTIVE OPERATION:** This action cannot be undone after the 30-day grace period

get.description:
Retrieve the calculated security risk score for a tenant based on various factors.

**Required Permission:** `platform:security:view-risk-scores`
**Allowed Roles:** SUPER_ADMIN, SECURITY_ADMIN, SUPPORT_ADMIN

Risk factors include: login patterns, failed attempts, IP anomalies, configuration weaknesses

post.description:
Start the MFA enrollment process for the authenticated platform user. Returns a QR code and backup codes.

**Note:** MFA is not active until verified with a valid code.

**Flow:**
1. Call this endpoint to get QR code and secret
2. Scan QR code with authenticator app
3. Call POST /platform/mfa/verify with code from app
4. Store backup codes securely

qrCode.description: Data URI for QR code image

post.description:
Complete MFA enrollment by verifying a TOTP code from the authenticator app. After successful verification, MFA will be required for all future logins.

**⚠️ Important:** Ensure backup codes are saved before enabling MFA

400.description: Invalid MFA code or MFA not set up

post.description:
Disable MFA for the authenticated platform user. Requires password confirmation.

**⚠️ Security Warning:** Disabling MFA reduces account security. A reason is required for audit purposes.

get.description:
Retrieve the list of unused backup codes for the authenticated user.

**Security Note:** Backup codes are shown only once during setup. This endpoint shows remaining count but codes are masked.

post.description:
Generate a new set of backup codes, invalidating all previous codes.

**⚠️ Important:** Store the new codes securely. Previous codes will no longer work.

post.summary: Verify MFA code during platform login

404.description: Audit log not found

get.summary: Get audit log by ID (Admin only)

info.title: Softy ERP
info.description:
API for Softy - Manages Bookings, Field Tasks, Finance, and HR/Payroll.

## API Contexts

This API supports three distinct contexts:

### 🏢 Tenant Context (Business Operations)
Regular business users access tenant-scoped endpoints. JWT tokens have `audience: "tenant"`.

### 👑 Platform Context (Superadmin)
Platform administrators access `/platform/*` endpoints for SaaS management. JWT tokens have `audience: "platform"`. **MFA is mandatory.**

### 🔓 Public Context
Unauthenticated endpoints for registration, login, and public resources.

### CSRF
This API uses Authorization Bearer tokens and does not require CSRF tokens.

## Rate Limit Contract

- 429 responses include `Retry-After` header with retry seconds.
- Common throttled responses: `Too many requests` or `Too many requests. Blocked for N seconds.`

## Role Hierarchy

| Context | Roles | Access Level |
|---------|-------|--------------|
| Platform | SUPER_ADMIN | Full platform access |
| Platform | SUPPORT_ADMIN | Impersonation, view logs, suspend tenants |
| Platform | BILLING_ADMIN | Subscriptions, refunds, revenue |
| Platform | SECURITY_ADMIN | Lock tenants, force password reset |
| Platform | COMPLIANCE_ADMIN | GDPR export/delete, audit logs |
| Platform | ANALYTICS_VIEWER | Read-only metrics |
| Tenant | ADMIN | Full tenant access |
| Tenant | OPS_MANAGER | Operations management |
| Tenant | FIELD_STAFF | Task execution |
| Tenant | CLIENT | Portal access only |

### Tenant Admin - User Creation Guidance

Tenant Admin can create studio-side users primarily with roles: `OPS_MANAGER`, `FIELD_STAFF`, and `CLIENT`.


---
Docs build: openapi-export @ 1970-01-01T00:00:00.000Z

password.description: Plaintext password supplied by the platform operator. Hashed with Argon2id before persistence; log a security warning at the call site so the plaintext is not retained.

initialAdmin.description: First tenant admin. A User with role=ADMIN is created in the same transaction as the tenant. Plaintext password is consumed by the service and not persisted or logged.

subscriptionStartedAt.description: Subscription start date (ISO 8601). Pass null to clear.

subscriptionEndsAt.description: Subscription end date (ISO 8601). Pass null to clear.

trialEndsAt.description: Trial end date (ISO 8601). Pass null to clear.

gracePeriodDays.description: Grace period in days before full suspension

reason.description: Reason for cancelling scheduled deletion (optional when sent via query)

userId.description: ID of the user to impersonate

approvalTicketId.description: Support ticket ID authorising this impersonation

ipAddresses.description: List of allowed IP addresses or CIDR ranges

reason.description: Reason for updating the IP allowlist

dataCategories.description: Data categories to export (all if omitted)

code.description: MFA TOTP code from authenticator app

tempToken.description: Temporary MFA token from login response

message.description: Error message or array of validation errors

path.description: API path where the error occurred

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp of when the error occurred

code.description: Stable i18n error code for programmatic handling

errors.description: Per-field validation errors with translated messages

requiresMfa.description: Indicates MFA verification is required to complete login

tempToken.description: Temporary MFA token (valid for 5 minutes) used to verify TOTP or recovery code

codes.description: Array of 10 recovery codes. Store these securely - they are shown only once.

warning.description: Warning message if running low on codes
warning.example: Warning: Only 2 recovery codes remaining. Consider regenerating.

password.description: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character (@$!%*?&)

refreshToken.description: Refresh token to revoke (optional, revokes current session)

allSessions.description: If true, revokes all sessions for this user

code.description: The TOTP code from the app

tempToken.description: Temporary MFA token received from login endpoint
Temporary MFA token received from login endpoint

currentRefreshToken.description: Current refresh token to keep (revoke all other sessions)

newPassword.description: New password (min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number, 1 special char)

reason.description: Optional reason for deletion — stored in audit trail for soft-deleted entities.
reason.example: Duplicate record — merged into ID abc-123.

description.example: Complete wedding photography and video coverage

skipStaffCheck.description: When true, skip staff availability checks for this package (e.g., venue-only packages)

description.example: Complete wedding photography and video coverage

skipStaffCheck.description: When true, skip staff availability checks for this package (e.g., venue-only packages)

newName.description: Name for the new cloned package

newPrice.description: Optional price override for the clone

durationMinutes.description: Snapshot of package duration in minutes

status.description: Booking lifecycle: DRAFT=request, CONFIRMED=accepted request, COMPLETED=service delivered, CANCELLED=cancelled/rejected

invoiceId.description: Invoice ID linked to this booking (generated on confirm)

processingTypes.description: Processing types selected for this booking

locationLink.description: Location link (Google Maps URL or similar)

processingTypeIds.description: Processing type IDs to associate with this booking

skipAvailabilityCheck.description: Admin-only: skip staff availability check and force the booking through

available.description: True when requested window is available

conflictReasons.description: List of blocking conflicts; empty when available=true

status.description: Lifecycle transitions are workflow-only. Generic PATCH with status is rejected; use /confirm, /cancel, /complete, /reschedule endpoints.

locationLink.description: Location link (Google Maps URL or similar)

processingTypeIds.description: Processing type IDs to associate with this booking (replaces existing selection)

skipAvailabilityCheck.description: Admin-only: skip staff availability check and force confirmation
Admin-only: skip staff availability check and force the reschedule

transactionDate.description: Date/time the payment was received. Defaults to now.
Date/time the final payment was received. Defaults to now.

amount.description: Refund amount (must not exceed total amount paid)

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used for the refund

transactionDate.description: Date/time the refund was issued. Defaults to now.

clientId.description: Existing client UUID. Provide this OR name to create a new client.

name.description: Full name for a new client.

transactionDate.description: Date/time the deposit was received. Defaults to now.

locationLink.description: Google Maps or event location URL

processingTypeIds.description: Processing type UUIDs to attach to this booking

deposit.description: Optional deposit to record as part of this single transaction.

skipAvailabilityCheck.description: Admin-only: skip staff availability check and force the booking through

clientId.description: UUID of the client (existing or newly created)

bookingId.description: UUID of the newly created booking (DRAFT status)

depositTransactionId.description: UUID of the deposit transaction, when a deposit was provided

userId.description: User ID to assign the task to
User ID to assign to this task

commissionSnapshot.description: Pending commission snapshot for this assignee (must be > 0)

taskId.description: Task ID to track time for

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate in decimal degrees (-90 to 90)

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate in decimal degrees (-180 to 180)

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate in decimal degrees (-90 to 90)

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate in decimal degrees (-180 to 180)

hasNextPage.description: Whether there is a next page

hasPreviousPage.description: Whether there is a previous page

role.description: Allowed roles for studio staff creation

month.description: Target month (1-12). Defaults to current month when omitted.

year.description: Target year. Defaults to current year when omitted.

effectiveFrom.description: Slot is active from this date (inclusive)
Slot is active from this date (inclusive)

isOpen.description: Is this day a working day
